requirement_topic.zh: 电磁兼容——发射要求（EN 55014-1）——德国/欧盟
requirement_topic.zht: 電磁相容——發射要求（EN 55014-1）——德國/歐盟

summary.en: EMC Directive 2014/30/EU (implemented in Germany via EMVG — Gesetz über die elektromagnetische Verträglichkeit von Betriebsmitteln) requires heat pumps to comply with electromagnetic emission limits. Harmonised standard EN 55014-1:2021 specifies conducted and radiated emission limits for household appliances. The Federal Network Agency (Bundesnetzagentur, BNetzA) is the German market surveillance authority for EMC. DIN/DKE publishes German adoptions of European standards. Heat pump compressors, motors, and inverter drives are significant emission sources covered by this standard.
summary.zh: 电磁兼容指令2014/30/EU（在德国通过EMVG——《设备电磁兼容法》实施）要求热泵满足电磁发射限值要求。协调标准EN 55014-1:2021规定家用电器的传导和辐射发射限值。联邦网络局（BNetzA）是德国电磁兼容市场监督机构。DIN/DKE发布欧洲标准的德国采标版本。热泵压缩机、电机和变频器驱动是该标准所涵盖的重要发射源。
summary.zht: 電磁相容指令2014/30/EU（在德國通過EMVG——《設備電磁相容法》實施）要求熱泵滿足電磁發射限值要求。協調標準EN 55014-1:2021規定家用電器的傳導和輻射發射限值。聯邦網路局（BNetzA）是德國電磁相容市場監督機構。DIN/DKE發布歐洲標準的德國採標版本。熱泵壓縮機、電機和變頻器驅動是該標準所涵蓋的重要發射源。

summary.en: GB 4343.1-2018 (Electromagnetic disturbance characteristics of household electrical appliances, electric tools and similar apparatus — Part 1: Emission) is China's national adoption of CISPR 14-1. EMC emission testing is included under CCC certification for domestic appliances, conducted at CNAS/CMA accredited laboratories.
summary.zh: GB 4343.1-2018（家用电器、电动工具和类似器具的电磁骚扰特性——第1部分：发射）是中国对CISPR 14-1的国家采标。电磁发射测试纳入家用电器CCC认证范围，由CNAS/CMA认可实验室进行。
summary.zht: GB 4343.1-2018（家用電器、電動工具和類似器具的電磁騷擾特性——第1部分：發射）是中國對CISPR 14-1的國家採標。電磁發射測試納入家用電器CCC認證範圍，由CNAS/CMA認可實驗室進行。

gap.en: Although GB 4343.1-2018 and EN 55014-1:2021 share a common CISPR 14-1 lineage, Chinese CCC test reports under GB 4343.1 are not accepted as evidence of EU/German EMC Directive conformity. Re-testing to EN 55014-1:2021 at a laboratory recognised for EU EMC purposes is required. Market surveillance in Germany is enforced by BNetzA; a new EU Declaration of Conformity and the EMVG filing requirements must be met.
gap.zh: 尽管GB 4343.1-2018和EN 55014-1:2021同源于CISPR 14-1，但基于GB 4343.1的中国CCC测试报告不被接受为欧盟/德国EMC指令合规证明。需在欧盟认可实验室按EN 55014-1:2021重新测试。德国市场监督由BNetzA执行；须满足新欧盟符合性声明和EMVG备案要求。
gap.zht: 儘管GB 4343.1-2018和EN 55014-1:2021同源於CISPR 14-1，但基於GB 4343.1的中國CCC測試報告不被接受為歐盟/德國EMC指令合規證明。需在歐盟認可實驗室按EN 55014-1:2021重新測試。德國市場監督由BNetzA執行；須滿足新歐盟符合性聲明和EMVG備案要求。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory (EU EMC Directive + German EMVG; BNetzA market surveillance)
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory (CCC certification includes EMC emission testing)

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Gap — re-testing to EN 55014-1:2021 required; GB 4343.1 CCC test reports not accepted as EU/German EMC Directive conformity evidence; BNetzA enforces market surveillance in Germany.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 存在差距——需按EN 55014-1:2021重新测试；GB 4343.1 CCC测试报告不被接受为欧盟/德国EMC指令合规证明；BNetzA在德国执行市场监督。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 存在差距——需按EN 55014-1:2021重新測試；GB 4343.1 CCC測試報告不被接受為歐盟/德國EMC指令合規證明；BNetzA在德國執行市場監督。

requirement_topic.en: EMC — Immunity and Power Quality (EN 55014-2 / EN 61000 Series) — Germany / EU
requirement_topic.zh: 电磁兼容——抗扰度与电能质量（EN 55014-2 / EN 61000系列）——德国/欧盟
requirement_topic.zht: 電磁相容——抗擾度與電能品質（EN 55014-2 / EN 61000系列）——德國/歐盟

summary.en: EMC Directive 2014/30/EU (German: EMVG) covers immunity as well as emissions. EN 55014-2:2021 specifies immunity requirements for household appliances. EN 61000-3-2 limits harmonic currents; EN 61000-3-3 limits voltage fluctuations and flicker. Germany's grid supply is 230/400 V 50 Hz; harmonic compliance at this voltage must be demonstrated. Conformity assessment is via manufacturer self-declaration with a Technical File (Annex II of the EMC Directive); no third-party body is mandatory but test evidence must be retained. BNetzA is the enforcement authority.
summary.zh: 电磁兼容指令2014/30/EU（德国：EMVG）同时涵盖抗扰度和发射。EN 55014-2:2021规定家用电器的抗扰度要求。EN 61000-3-2限制谐波电流；EN 61000-3-3限制电压波动和闪烁。德国电网电压为230/400 V 50 Hz；须证明在该电压下的谐波合规性。合规评估通过制造商自我声明并附技术文件（EMC指令附件II）进行；无强制第三方机构要求，但须保存测试证据。BNetzA为执法机构。
summary.zht: 電磁相容指令2014/30/EU（德國：EMVG）同時涵蓋抗擾度和發射。EN 55014-2:2021規定家用電器的抗擾度要求。EN 61000-3-2限制諧波電流；EN 61000-3-3限制電壓波動和閃爍。德國電網電壓為230/400 V 50 Hz；須證明在該電壓下的諧波合規性。合規評估通過製造商自我聲明並附技術文件（EMC指令附件II）進行；無強制第三方機構要求，但須保存測試證據。BNetzA為執法機構。

summary.en: GB/T 17625.1 (harmonic current emissions — national adoption of IEC 61000-3-2), GB/T 17625.2 (voltage fluctuations — national adoption of IEC 61000-3-3), and GB/T 4343.2-2020 (immunity — adoption of CISPR 14-2) are the Chinese equivalents. These share IEC/CISPR lineage with the EU harmonised standards but Chinese test reports are not accepted for EU/German market conformity.
summary.zh: GB/T 17625.1（谐波电流发射——IEC 61000-3-2国家采标）、GB/T 17625.2（电压波动——IEC 61000-3-3国家采标）和GB/T 4343.2-2020（抗扰度——CISPR 14-2采标）是对应的中国标准。这些标准与欧盟协调标准同源于IEC/CISPR，但中国测试报告不被接受用于欧盟/德国市场合规。
summary.zht: GB/T 17625.1（諧波電流發射——IEC 61000-3-2國家採標）、GB/T 17625.2（電壓波動——IEC 61000-3-3國家採標）和GB/T 4343.2-2020（抗擾度——CISPR 14-2採標）是對應的中國標準。這些標準與歐盟協調標準同源於IEC/CISPR，但中國測試報告不被接受用於歐盟/德國市場合規。

gap.en: Separate EU conformity assessment is required. Existing Chinese immunity and power-quality test reports do not substitute for EU Technical File evidence. Testing must reflect the German grid (230/400 V, 50 Hz). A new EU Declaration of Conformity covering all applicable EMC Directive requirements must be issued; EMVG obligations in Germany additionally apply.
gap.zh: 需要独立的欧盟合规评估。现有中国抗扰度和电能质量测试报告不能替代欧盟技术文件证据。测试须反映德国电网（230/400 V，50 Hz）条件。须出具涵盖所有适用EMC指令要求的新欧盟符合性声明；德国EMVG义务额外适用。
gap.zht: 需要獨立的歐盟合規評估。現有中國抗擾度和電能品質測試報告不能替代歐盟技術文件證據。測試須反映德國電網（230/400 V，50 Hz）條件。須出具涵蓋所有適用EMC指令要求的新歐盟符合性聲明；德國EMVG義務額外適用。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory (EU EMC Directive + German EMVG; self-declaration with Technical File; BNetzA enforcement)

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Gap — separate EU conformity assessment required at German grid voltage (230/400 V 50 Hz); existing Chinese test reports do not substitute for EU EMC Directive Technical File evidence; BNetzA enforces compliance in Germany.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 存在差距——需在德国电网电压（230/400 V 50 Hz）条件下进行独立的欧盟合规评估；现有中国测试报告不能替代欧盟EMC指令技术文件证据；BNetzA在德国执行合规监督。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 存在差距——需在德國電網電壓（230/400 V 50 Hz）條件下進行獨立的歐盟合規評估；現有中國測試報告不能替代歐盟EMC指令技術文件證據；BNetzA在德國執行合規監督。
